cancel_governance.title: Cancel Idempotency Proof
cancel_governance.content: Cancel must be idempotent. Duplicate cancel returns success without error.

cancel_governance.title: Unknown Order Policy
cancel_governance.content: Cancel of unknown order returns success (already cancelled or never existed).

cancel_governance.title: Terminal Order Policy
cancel_governance.content: Cancel of terminal order (filled, cancelled, expired) returns success.

cancel_governance.title: Duplicate Cancel Policy
cancel_governance.content: Duplicate cancel within 60s returns cached result.

cancel_governance.title: Emergency Cancel Procedure
cancel_governance.content: Operator can cancel all open orders immediately. Requires confirmation.

cancel_governance.title: Cancel Audit Log Proof
cancel_governance.content: Every cancel attempt logged: order_id, result, timestamp, operator.

cancel_governance.title: Manual Cancel Override Policy
cancel_governance.content: Operator can override cancel failures. Override logged and reviewed.

reconciliation_governance.title: Balance Snapshot Proof
reconciliation_governance.content: Balance snapshot taken before and after each reconciliation cycle.

reconciliation_governance.title: Position Snapshot Proof
reconciliation_governance.content: Position snapshot taken before and after each reconciliation cycle.

reconciliation_governance.title: Staleness Threshold
reconciliation_governance.content: Snapshots older than 30s considered stale. Stale snapshots trigger warning.

reconciliation_governance.title: Mismatch Resolution Policy
reconciliation_governance.content: Mismatch detected: log warning, hold new orders, notify operator.

reconciliation_governance.title: Manual Override Policy
reconciliation_governance.content: Operator can override mismatch. Override logged and reviewed.

reconciliation_governance.title: Audit Chain Proof
reconciliation_governance.content: Reconciliation events in tamper-evident audit chain.

reconciliation_governance.title: Operator Review Policy
reconciliation_governance.content: Operator must review reconciliation report before next trading cycle.
